meaning: n.鸟冠,盔上的装饰(如羽毛),顶部,顶峰,浪头vi.到达绝顶vt.加以顶饰
examples: Annie touched the Pteranodon's crest and stroked its neck.
On the wall is the family crest.
Both birds had a dark blue crest.
Crest has deep pockets as it has demonstrated its determination to pursue its case.
She rode the crest of the Tea Party when it was at its height.
